E

echo(String) - Method in class org.docgene.scripts.DocJScriptContext
Echo an information message through the parser integrated console.
ElementHook - Interface in org.docgene.plugins
An element hook is a class which is able to handle ParagraphElements to add content to the output.
endsWithNewLine(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLSentence
Sets if the sentence ends with a new line.
endsWithNewLine(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLSpan
Sets if the sentence ends with a new line.
ENUM - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLIncludedAPI
enum.
equals(Object) - Method in class org.docgene.model.ArticleRef
 
equals(Object) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
 
err(String) - Method in class org.docgene.scripts.DocJScriptContext
Echo an error message to the System.err Stream.
error(String) - Method in class org.docgene.scripts.DocJScriptContext
Echo an error message through the parser integrated console.
EXTERNAL_LINK - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLExtendedImage
Tags an external link extended image.
